title: Class 345 (Elizabeth Line)
description: Class 345 for Minecraft Transit Railway mod
body:
Created by Skywalker_6517

- Textures by Jonathan Ho and Navi
- Sounds by Navi and Szandor13
- Wheel positions and bogie by Extreme Maker X
- Additional help from Georgecat19


### The pack adds a realistic class 345, with **pantographs and accurate livery layouts** better than the base mode version!

This is a resource pack for the Minecraft Transit Railway mod and it adds the class 345 to the mod for **MTR 3 and MTR 4** users. Since the official class 345 is only in newer versions of the mod, this is the perfect replacement!
